title: Write On
excerpt: Yesterday I posted this photo on Instagram and was pleasantly surprised at all the likes and comments. Thank you! As a lover of pens, I was super excited about these Slick Writers (and the colors) that are part of the…
body:
Yesterday I posted this photo on Instagram and was pleasantly surprised at all the likes and comments. Thank you! As a lover of pens, I was super excited about these Slick Writers (and the colors) that are part of the Yes, Please collection. They are fine tip and they write beautifully on photos!

Available at Two Peas In A Bucket and Simon Says Stamp. Also, the winner of the Silhouette Portrait announced in the post below. The discount code TANGERINE is good through March 31!
